top_signals.title: Indonesia and Philippines raise rates to combat energy shock
top_signals.summary: South-east Asian countries seek to shore up currencies that have been among region’s worst-performing this year
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: How Hizbollah made its comeback
top_signals.summary: Lebanese militant group has been buoyed by fresh support from Tehran but its future depends on the US-Iran peace deal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Atomic Lab Sounds Alarm on Screwworm Spread Across the Americas
top_signals.summary: A key international nuclear lab helping to eradicate the New World screwworm says more sterile flies and better coordination with southern neighbors is needed to prevent the deadly parasite from spreading across North America.

top_signals.title: More than a million landlords unprepared for tougher energy efficiency rules
top_signals.summary: Buy-to-let lender to offer discounted loans to help borrowers fund improvements before rules tighten in 2030
